mapper.sql: id, content, user_id, discussion_id, parent_reply_id, status, created_time, updated_time
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.username as author_name, u.avatar_url as author_avatar FROM replies r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.discussion_id = #{discussionId} AND r.status = 'active' ORDER BY r.created_time ASC
SELECT FROM replies WHERE parent_reply_id = #{parentReplyId} AND status = 'active' ORDER BY created_time ASC
SELECT FROM replies WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'active' ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT FROM replies WHERE status = 'active' ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
